expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: defect feedback loop injects scenarios from prior defects into next feature QA plan
expectations.evidence: In result.md the run states the benchmark focus but concludes it is not present: "Defect feedback loop behavior is not present as a contract requirement" and "There is no described mechanism... mandates injecting defect-derived scenarios into a new feature QA plan." This means the case focus is not explicitly covered in the produced outputs.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase8
expectations.evidence: The produced output does not align to phase8; it asserts phase8 cannot be validated: "The provided skill snapshot defines phases 0–7 only... No Phase 8 is specified" and "there is no contract-defined 'phase8' output to align to." Therefore alignment with primary phase phase8 is not demonstrated.
